item.title: [BlueSky] I was happy to see Band Maid again, but when they only played 3 older songs, ...
item.dc:creator: Taylor (yoshikosisland.bsky.social)
item.description:
I was happy to see Band Maid again, but when they only played 3 older songs, and none of them were Thrill, a part of me maybe died inside and almost turned me into a type of Guy

BlueSky · yoshikosisland.bsky.social

item.title: [Mastodon] Das Band-Maid Konzert gestern hat mir letzten Endes sehr gut gefallen.
item.dc:creator: Dodger (dodger@social.tchncs.de)
item.description:
Das Band-Maid Konzert gestern hat mir letzten Endes sehr gut gefallen.
Negativ war das die Damen mit 30 Minuten Verspätung anfingen.

https://social.tchncs.de/tags/bandmaid https://social.tchncs.de/tags/music https://social.tchncs.de/tags/livemusic https://social.tchncs.de/tags/japan

item.title: [BlueSky] its still so annoying how her character is terrible and makes me constantly g...
item.dc:creator: KINDAFREE | IRI (denofsin.bsky.social)
item.description:
its still so annoying how her character is terrible and makes me constantly groan but her gameplay and overall troll-ass animations/voice lines are fun as fuck

At least outfit 3 color 10 can let me pretend i'm just playing some random member of Babymetal or BAND-MAID

BlueSky · denofsin.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] <3 this band. So many American metal fans knows about Lovebites and Band-Mai...
item.dc:creator: Erica Anderson (eanderson75.bsky.social)
item.description:
<3 this band. So many American metal fans knows about Lovebites and Band-Maid (whom both are amazing) but they really don't do a deep dive into the metal scene in Japan. When I mention Onmyo-Za, Ghost Cries, Serenity in Murder, Valkyrie Zero, it is like "who?!".

youtu.be/z39EzGg3sLw?...

BlueSky · eanderson75.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Took a day off from going to the cinema and went to the Band-Maid concert ins...
item.dc:creator: q87 (q87.bsky.social)
item.description:
Took a day off from going to the cinema and went to the Band-Maid concert instead.
It was a lot of fun. Let's meet again. 🎸🤘

BlueSky · q87.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] KANAMI: The theme here is “circus”. We had finished the album, but then SAIKI...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
KANAMI: The theme here is “circus”. We had finished the album, but then SAIKI mentioned that a BAND-MAID record isn’t complete without an instrumental. Composing this made me feel like we found the missing piece to a puzzle.

MIKU & SAIKI: The title is all about climbing higher, even still. We can d

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] so, po
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
so, po

— It’s nice it has both.

Kobato: Yes, po. We Band-Maid don’t limit ourselves so much, and we think it’s OK to have various songs, so we think differently depending on each song, po.

Kanami: Also depending on each period. Like “This is what I want to do now!” (laughs)
---------------------

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 1 week till I get to see my favourite Japanese ladies rocking out. I can not ...
item.dc:creator: Tom Southcott (solidpython.bsky.social)
item.description:
1 week till I get to see my favourite Japanese ladies rocking out. I can not wait! #BandMaid

BlueSky · solidpython.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] I think it has to be Band-Maid's "Just Bring It". It's the ideal gateway albu...
item.dc:creator: Barry McKinnon (rockyuphill.bsky.social)
item.description:
I think it has to be Band-Maid's "Just Bring It". It's the ideal gateway album for people that had no idea about the unique world of all female rock bands in Japan, rock musicians especially are knocked out by the high level of performance and composition.

BlueSky · rockyuphill.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Hier die versprochenen Fotos :3
item.dc:creator: FischVomTisch (fischvomtisch.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hier die versprochenen Fotos :3
Das Konzert war mega geil. Die crowd und Band-maid waren voller Energie. Alle Songs waren sehr gut.
War mein 1. Mal auf einem Band-Maid Konzert und hoffe die kommen wieder nach Deutschland. Werde nächstes mal auch dabei sein ♥️

BlueSky · fischvomtisch.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Guten Tag zusammen :3
item.dc:creator: FischVomTisch (fischvomtisch.bsky.social)
item.description:
Guten Tag zusammen :3
Bin gerade noch etwas Tod von dem Band-Maid Konzert gestern, aber ich werde später wieder Online sein auf der Lila Plattform mit TFT :D
Werde gleich noch paar Fotos posten vom Konzert c:
Habt noch einen schönen Tag🧡❤️

BlueSky · fischvomtisch.bsky.social

item.title: [Mastodon] So I went to see https://pixelfed.automat.click/discover/tags/Band?src=hash-M...
item.dc:creator: Carsten Raddatz (carstenraddatz@pixelfed.automat.click)
item.description:
So I went to see https://pixelfed.automat.click/discover/tags/Band?src=hash-Maid https://pixelfed.automat.click/discover/tags/bandmaid?src=hash at the Columbia Theater in https://pixelfed.automat.click/discover/tags/Berlin?src=hash. Great convert! If you haven't heard them, my take: they are loud! Cross over heavy metal, guitar solos and all, blues rock, punk-ish and grunge-ian themes, allude to pop and pack crazy rhythm changes all the time too. Perfect!

Mastodon · carstenraddatz@pixelfed.automat.click

item.title: [Mastodon] Keine Festivals in 2026, dafür dann halt ein paar Konzerte. https://pixelfed....
item.dc:creator: RockDJ.de (rockdj@pixelfed.de)
item.description:
Keine Festivals in 2026, dafür dann halt ein paar Konzerte. https://pixelfed.de/discover/tags/Bandmaid?src=hash touren nach 7 Jahren endlich mal wieder durch Europa, wobei die "Tour" aus lediglich 5 Konzerten besteht. Egal, auf nach Berlin ins Columbia Theater. Die Hütte war ballerheiß und brechenvoll. Der Sound war überhaupt gar nicht geil, was gerade bei Bandmaid sehr, sehr traurig ist. Frustsaufen fiel aber aus - Berliner Pilsener für 7€ zzgl. Becherpfand? Nein, danke. Merch war übrigens auch schweineteuer und Tonträger hatten sie gar nicht erst dabei :(

Die Band hat sich trotz allem echt Mühe gegeben und gute anderthalb Stunden beste Stimmung und prima Laune verbreitet. Alles in allem ein durchwachsener Abend, hoffentlich dauert es nicht wieder 7 Jahre und hoffentlich spielen sie dann in einer Location mit besserem Sound.

https://pixelfed.de/discover/tags/live?src=hash https://pixelfed.de/discover/tags/liveonstage?src=hash https://pixelfed.de/discover/tags/rock?src=hash https://pixelfed.de/discover/tags/jrock?src=hash https://pixelfed.de/discover/tags/musik?src=hash https://pixelfed.de/discover/tags/muziek?src=hash https://pixelfed.de/discover/tags/music?src=hash

Mastodon · rockdj@pixelfed.de

item.title: [BlueSky] Forza Horizon 6 - particularly Horizon XS radio - continuing to get me into b...
item.dc:creator: Brian A. Bradshaw (brianabradshaw.bsky.social)
item.description:
Forza Horizon 6 - particularly Horizon XS radio - continuing to get me into bands I hadn't cared or even tried to listen to before.

Spiritbox, BAND-MAID, South Arcade (all female-led or all-female bands 👊🏻) and Sleep Theory have been getting regular listens on my walks.

BlueSky · brianabradshaw.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] band maid was super cool!!!!
item.dc:creator: Vanvan Ovenlunch (eating-shoes.bsky.social)
item.description:
band maid was super cool!!!!

BlueSky · eating-shoes.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Anyone who hasn't noticed the rises of Thou, Band-Maid, and Zeal and Ardor ha...
item.dc:creator: Robert Beveridge (xterminalnoise.bsky.social)
item.description:
Anyone who hasn't noticed the rises of Thou, Band-Maid, and Zeal and Ardor has gotta get with it. The kids are all right.

(57 here, and the best year for music in my lifetime was 2016... so far.)

BlueSky · xterminalnoise.bsky.social

item.title: [Mastodon] War schön mit Band-Maid

item.description:
War schön mit Band-Maid

item.title: [BlueSky] Ich freue mich auf ein spannendes Konzert heute Abend. 🙂
item.dc:creator: Marc on Drums ← ZURÜCK in die ZUKUNFT ← den Backlash beenden! (marcondrums.eurosky.social)
item.description:
Ich freue mich auf ein spannendes Konzert heute Abend. 🙂

🔥🤘🎵

#BAND-MAID @bandmaidotdbot.bsky.social
#Rock #Metal #Livemusik #Berlin

BlueSky · marcondrums.eurosky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] THE most important song in Band Maid's history. A B-Side they made a video fo...
item.dc:creator: Sam Inglis (24fpsuk.bsky.social)
item.description:
THE most important song in Band Maid's history. A B-Side they made a video for that kept them from getting dropped, got millions of hits, and sent them to their first overseas gig.

FAR from my favourite of their songs, but the band wouldn't exist without it, and it's still a decent intro

BlueSky · 24fpsuk.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] e Thrill, each of us separately looked for a direction that would match Band-...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
e Thrill, each of us separately looked for a direction that would match Band-Maid®, but we decided our musical direction through Thrill and united together, which was really important. Each of us changed our approach in sound making.

Misa (bass): Since all of us are technique-oriented, we like our

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] — By the way, which BAND-MAID songs can you play relatively easily?
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
— By the way, which BAND-MAID songs can you play relatively easily?

KANAMI: Maybe “Thrill” is the easiest to play?

Saiki: Isn’t “FREEDOM”?

Miku: No.

MISA: Eh?

AKANE: The degree of difficulty depends on which part you play (laughs)
--------------------

— The first trigger that made you greatly

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Yeah they needed some Nemophilia and HANABIE added though. I could do without...
item.dc:creator: 🔞Asia the Magical Gurl🏳️‍🌈 (themagicalgurl.bsky.social)
item.description:
Yeah they needed some Nemophilia and HANABIE added though. I could do without Coheed and Cambria amongst my Babymetal and BAND-MAID...

Also, they have an entire Synthwave station and no Nightcall by Kavinsky... TF is that??

BlueSky · themagicalgurl.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Oh right, can't let yall forget I'm a huge dork

item.title: [BlueSky] who wants to talk about how amazing a piece of instrumental rock this is to b...
item.dc:creator: 🏳️‍⚧️ Bog Witch Girl 🏳️‍⚧️ (bogwitch-girl.bsky.social)
item.description:
who wants to talk about how amazing a piece of instrumental rock this is to be used in Rock is a Lady's Modesty for Tina to work past her insecurities with her stage presence and people-pleasing

I hope we got a second season with BAND-MAID doing an absolutely mad cover of this (eventually)

BlueSky · bogwitch-girl.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] — I can’t live without you. must be an exciting song at servings. Will you be...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
— I can’t live without you. must be an exciting song at servings. Will you be able to sing it?

Saiki: I’ll be able to sing it easily before the next serving, probably?

Miku Kobato: We Band-Maid are basically like that. First, we train ourselves at recording and record our best, then we practice by

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Song: I can't live without you.

1st Live:3/17/2018

item.title: [BlueSky] It's been a day. Time to drop another grenade and go to sleep. Best rock band...
item.dc:creator: persona non sequitur (nouseforajames.bsky.social)
item.description:
It's been a day. Time to drop another grenade and go to sleep. Best rock bands of my lifetime:
1. Band-Maid
2.
3. Faith No More
4. Gacharic Spin/Doll$Boxx
5. Alice in Chains

Honorable mention to NEK! who would be on this list if they weren't literal children, but in a couple more albums, yeah.

BlueSky · nouseforajames.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] It only took hearing one song on YouTube to hook me, Domination (official liv...
item.dc:creator: Barry McKinnon (rockyuphill.bsky.social)
item.description:
It only took hearing one song on YouTube to hook me, Domination (official live video) by Band-Maid. I promptly dove down the rabbit hole (or pigeon hole, IYKYK) to listen to all of their available catalog, and now they are just my favourite band on the planet.

BlueSky · rockyuphill.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Kanami: I was pretty conscious of newness when I wrote it. It’s based on the ...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
Kanami: I was pretty conscious of newness when I wrote it. It’s based on the Band-Maid style, but I wrote it with an image that… it will give accent to future servings (laughs).

Saiki: It’s also a song that showcases our instrumentalists. Am I right?

Kanami: Yes, it is (laughs). I thought it would

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] It's no wonder Band-Maid are cooperative with reaction channels, it is the in...
item.dc:creator: Barry McKinnon (rockyuphill.bsky.social)
item.description:
It's no wonder Band-Maid are cooperative with reaction channels, it is the internet version of word of mouth recommendations for music. People from countries all over the planet react to Band-Maid. For a small band who took over management of themselves in 2024, what a great gateway for new fans.

BlueSky · rockyuphill.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] New records of the week 🖤
item.dc:creator: Mike York (mikeyork.bsky.social)
item.description:
New records of the week 🖤
The March Violets – Made Glorious (beautiful purple vinyl)
IST IST – On Fire (shockingly ugly color 😎)
BAND-MAID – Epic Narratives (record day 2025 Japan release)

item.title: [BlueSky] he want for the song and I wrote it up.
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
he want for the song and I wrote it up.

Saiki: The text I messaged was, "Write something like, 'not seeming to know but I know, you know'".

— What do you mean by that?

Miku: She is really vague in her message (laughs). The basic theme of BAND-MAID's lyrics is the image of a strong woman, so I wro
